name: Tortellini Toss Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 6 oz. jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and cut up
1/4 cup purchased creamy Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the tortellini according to package instructions. Drain; rinse with cold water until chilled.
2. In a medium bowl, combine halved cherry tomatoes, sliced green onions, and marinated artichoke hearts.
3. Add the cooked tortellini and salad dressing to the bowl. Gently toss to coat evenly.
4. Serve immediately.
